title: ChemInform Abstract: Nucleic Acid Based Logical Systems
author_string: Han, Da, Kang, Huaizhi, Zhang, Tao, Wu, Cuichen, Zhou, Cuisong et al.
abstract: AbstractReview: the most recent and important developments in nucleic acid‐based logical devices and their evolution from in vitro, through cellular, even towards in vivo biological applications; 44 refs.
